item.title: 与波巴一起构建：波巴网络区块链开发的未来。 | Build with Boba: The Future of Blockchain Development with Boba Network.
item.description:
区块链技术无疑是未来的技术。 通过独特的方法，他们能够为区块链的下一个十亿用户提供更快、更便宜和更智能的体验，以及可扩展、安全和去中心化的平台，非常适合企业和个人。

在区块链技术方面，波巴确实在提升游戏水平，他们正在为区块链的未来设定标准。

是第一个第 2 层，也是目前唯一的多链第 2 层（L2）解决方案，也是 BNB Chain 上唯一活跃的 L2。 该协议完全符合 EVM，并且已经实现了对 Avalanche、BNB 和 Fantom 的多链支持。 它可以处理以毫秒为单位发生的交易，并且费用比相应的第 1 层便宜 40-100 倍，使其成为 dApp 开发、游戏和其他大批量交易的完美平台。

到目前为止，反响非常好，我们渴望看到网络的未来。

最近的发展及其对开发人员的意义

该网络拥有超过 45,000 个注册钱包，每天处理超过 100,000 笔交易。 这表明网络上的采用和活动大幅增加。

在波霸网络上，用户和开发者平均节省80%的交易手续费，交易速度极快。 这一杰出成就代表了在非以太坊环境中首次出现可观的 L2 交易量，这无疑将彻底改变交易并吸引更多用户使用该网络。

作为 BNB Chain 上先进的第 2 层扩容解决方案，波巴网络旨在加速 dApp 和游戏的开发，我们很高兴看到这个生态系统的未来”，---Zoe Wei，营销和 DevRel 负责人在 BNB 链。

这对开发人员意味着什么

对于开发人员，除了令人难以置信的速度和极低的费用外，Boba 还提供了一个基于交换的系统，用于快速 L2->L1 退出，使用普通 ETH 方法msg.value 、发送eth_sendTransaction和provider.getBalance(address))与 L2 ETH 进行正常交互provider.getBalance(address))而不是 WETH。 事实上，在网络上部署智能合约的过程也非常流畅和快速，对于大多数合约来说，部署体验就像在以太坊上部署一样。

波霸官方的开发栈很简单可以在这里了解，也可以在官方repo上为项目做贡献。

它已经被许多项目使用，并且已经与业内其他大公司建立了许多合作伙伴关系。

所有记录都表明波霸区块链网络呈上升趋势。 此外，由于短期和长期接受度的快速增长，Boba 显然前景广阔。 这对整个区块链生态系统来说是个好消息。 它展示了该技术的发展方式以及各种采用和应用的可能性。



原文:

Blockchain technology is undoubtedly the technology of the future. Boba Network is cutting through the industry with their innovative take on technology. With unique approach, they’re able to deliver a faster, cheaper and smarter experience for blockchain’s next billion users with scalable, secure, and decentralized platform that is perfect for businesses and individuals alike.

When it comes to blockchain technology, Boba is really upping the game and they are setting the standard for what the future of blockchain will look like.

Boba Network is a multichain layer-2 scaling solution that aims to unlock the potential of rollup technology and enable more flexible blockchain communication and increase Blockchain usability.

Been the first layer 2 and currently the only multichain Layer 2 (L2) solution and the sole active L2 on BNB Chain. The protocol is fully EVM compliant and has already implemented multichain support for Avalanche, BNB, and Fantom. It can handle transactions that happen in milliseconds, and charges that are 40–100 times cheaper than those of the corresponding layer-1, making it the perfect platform for dApps developments, games, and other high-volume transactions.

The Boba Network is a brand-new, cutting-edge platform that enables businesses and individuals to profit from a blockchain's speed and security.

The team behind the Boba Network is working hard to establish it as the preferred platform for both business and individual users even if it is still in its early stages of development. The response has been overwhelmingly favorable thus far, and we are eager to see what the network's future brings.

Recent Development and what it means for Developers

In April 2023, the team recently announced that its BobaBNB platform processed a record 2,863,240 transactions which is a huge surge when compared to 585,818 in March and 99,362 in February. The network has over 45,000 registered wallets and processes more than 100,000 transactions daily. This signifies the high increase in adoption and activities on the network.

On the Boba network, users and developers saves averagely 80% of the transaction fee and with extremely fast speeds of transaction. This outstanding accomplishment represents the first event of a sizable L2 transaction volume on a non-Ethereum environment and this will in no doubt revolutionize transactions and attract more users to the network.

“We are glad to see the growing adoption of BobaBNB with these remarkable transaction volumes. As an advanced layer-2 scaling solution on BNB Chain, Boba Network aims to accelerate the development of dApps and games, and we are excited to see what the future holds for this ecosystem”, ---Zoe Wei, Head of Marketing and DevRel at BNB Chain.

What this means for developers

For developers, asides incredible speed and extremely low fees, Boba offers a swap-based system for rapid L2->L1 exits, normal interacting with L2 ETH using the normal ETH methods msg.value, send eth_sendTransaction, and provider.getBalance(address)) rather than as WETH. The process of deploying smart contracts on the network is also smooth and fast in fact, for most contracts, the deploy experience is exactly like deploying on Ethereum.

The Boba official development stacks are simple and you can learn about it here, You can also contribute to the project on the official repo.

Boba is a fairly new blockchain that is designed to be scalable and fast. It is already being used by a number of projects and has already secured a number of partnerships with other big players in the industry.

All records indicate that the Boba blockchain network is trending upward. Furthermore, it is evident that Boba has a promising future due to its rapid short- and long-term growth in acceptance. This is fantastic news for the entire blockchain ecosystem. It demonstrates how the technology is developing and how a variety of adoptions and applications are possible for it.
item.author: techiechristie

    NextJS Admin Dashboard Template is in great demand because of its facilitation and robustness . And as a developer, there's nothing quite like finding a framework that makes your job easier. If you're a developer who lookout for ways to streamline your workflow and make your code more efficient. This is where Next JS comes in. But before heading towards the template, let's have some information about the technology Next JS.

    Furthermore, Next.js is a popular open-source JavaScript framework that allows you to build server-side rendered (SSR) and static web applications using React. It provides a streamlined development experience, with features like automatic code splitting, server-side rendering, and dynamic imports, helping you to build performant and scalable web applications. Moreover, with Next.js, you can create web applications that can handle large traffic volumes and make efficient use of server resources.

    Other advantageous features of Next JS include the ability to customize your blog template with the design manager tool, add custom code or scripts to the header and footer HTML, and attach stylesheets to the blog. Additionally, it offers server-side rendering, which can improve page load times and SEO. It also provides an integrated routing system, allowing for easy navigation between different pages within the application.

    Another cool thing about Next.js is that it allows you to use serverless functions to build parts of your website that execute directly on the server. This allows you to create dynamic content and can help reduce server costs, as you only pay for the resources used during each request.

    *Why Should You Go With Next JS
    *

    • Next.js is a popular React framework that provides server-side rendering, automatic code splitting, and easy configuration.
    • It enables developers to build fast and scalable web applications with ease, while also providing excellent SEO capabilities.
    • The template has also a great developer experience, as it supports hot reloading and fast refresh out of the box.
    • The framework comes with a lot of features and plugins that make building web applications even easier and more efficient.
    • It is used by many popular companies such as Netflix, Uber, and Hulu, which is a testament to its scalability and reliability.

    NextJS Template

    Developers can leverage a variety of Next.js dashboard templates to accelerate the development process of creating fully functional and production-ready dashboards. These templates generally come with pre-built layouts and components that cater to standard dashboard functionalities such as user management, data visualization, and authentication. 

    Our popular Next.js dashboard templates amongst developers include Dash UI, salvia-kit, chris-trapstar, Modernize, CoreUI PRO, Tokyo Free White, and many more. So, we will study all  NextJS Admin Dashboard Templates in detail in the following section. By capitalizing on these dashboards templates, developers can expedite development time and prioritize building out their app's unique features.

    Dash UI - NextJS Admin Template

    Dash UI is a Next. js-based admin dashboard template that is free and provides a comprehensive set of features. It includes mobile-first responsive layouts designed to be easily integrated into your web application, with pre-built UI components such as cards, tables, and authentication forms.

    Furthermore, it sounds like the Dash UI NextJS Admin Dashboard Template may be a great option for building web apps and pages for your next projects. This developer-friendly and highly customizable template can help make the process easier and allow you to create exactly what you need. 

    • Properly documented
    • More than 9 pages like Profile, Billing, 404, etc
    • Authentic Pages like Sign-In and Sign-Up
    • End-to-end comments
    • Compatible with the majority of browsers
    • Available on Github
    • Preview
    • Download

    Are you looking to build a professional and efficient web application with Next.js? Then, you might want to check out Starter NextJS Admin Dashboard Template.

    Starter: NextJS Admin Template

    The template is an excellent choice for anyone looking to build a modern and efficient web application. Also, its modern design, scalability, and optimization for performance make it stand out from the crowd. It has the power to take your web application to the next level.

    • Highly Scalable
    • Component availability like Charts and Graphs, Form inputs, Tables, etc
    • Optimization and Customization

    Preview
    Download

    Tokyo Free White - NextJS Admin Template

    The most recent version of Next.js is used for this admin dashboard template. Also, this is a cryptocurrency-inspired dashboard where all node dependencies are current and any future version will ensure this remains the case. Further, the template utilizes a modern blue hue accent color that complements the UI components framework, MUI (Material-UI), perfectly.

    Additionally, the Next JS admin dashboard is open source and will definitely support your end-to-end development process. The entire appearance can easily be modified by the developers.

    • Multiple pages available for the web app
    • Free open-source 
    • Common components available 
    • Messenger page

    Preview
    Download

    Materio - Free MUI React NextJS Admin Template

    This one is a detailed and result-driven Next JS admin dashboard specifically built for the developers. Hence if you are looking for a sleek and modern admin template for your next project, look no further than Materio - a free MUI React NextJS Admin Template.

    The template is packed with features and is fully responsive, making it a great choice for any project. And the best part? It's completely free to use. That's right - you can take advantage of all of its features without spending a dime. One of the standout features of Materio is its use of the MUI (Material-UI) framework. This allows for a consistent and cohesive design throughout the template, making it easy to use and navigate.

    • The Next JS admin dashboard has custom pages and components
    • Get applications like User List, User View, Email, Chat, Calendar, Invoice, and Roles & Permission.
    • Quick search and navigation
    • 3 chart libraries

    Preview
    Download

    CoreUI Pro NextJS Admin Template

    NextJS admin template is the modern template that will help you to manage your business, manage your workforce, and streamline your workflows with ease.

    Additionally, the Core UI Pro NextJS Admin Dashboard Template offers a wide range of features, including a responsive design that looks great on any device, a variety of customizable UI components, and an intuitive user interface that makes it easy to navigate.

    But what really sets this admin template apart is its incredible flexibility. Whether you're managing a project, tracking data, or monitoring your business's performance, Core UI Pro has the tools you need to get the job done. From simple dashboards to complex workflows, this template can handle it all.

    • Follows Next.js 13, Bootstrap 5, and React 18
    • Responsive in nature
    • Dynamic Bootstrap-based themes
    • Fully Customizable
    • Variable themes like Dark and light

    Preview
    Download

    Modernize NextJS Admin Template

    Are you tired of spending hours creating complex and confusing admin dashboards? Then, it's time to check out Modernize's Next JS admin dashboard template.

    Modernize has designed a template that is intuitive, user-friendly, and customizable to fit your exact needs. Its sleek design and pre-designed components make it easy for you to create a dashboard that is both aesthetically pleasing and functional.

    Further, the best part about this template is that it's built on Next JS, a popular React framework. This means that you can easily incorporate any React library and functionality you need, such as data visualization and analytics tools.

    Moreover, with its easy-to-use interface and responsive design, Modernize Next JS admin dashboard template can help you streamline your work process and boost productivity. Hence, no more struggling to figure out complex code or dealing with a clunky dashboard that slows you down.

    • Fully customizable components: Customize any component in the template using Next JS, React, and other libraries.
    •  Responsive design: Enjoy a smooth experience on any device, whether it's a desktop, tablet, or mobile.
    •  Dark mode: Switch to a dark mode theme with just a few clicks.
    •  Multiple layouts: Choose from multiple layouts to find the perfect fit for your dashboard.
    •  Proven technology: Built with popular and trusted technologies to ensure reliability, scalability, and security.

    Preview
    Download

    Windmill-Next JS Admin Dashboard

    A powerful, reliable, and robust Next JS admin dashboard template. It drives power to your application with its dynamic features. This intuitive and user-friendly dashboard is designed to help businesses streamline their operations by providing a clear and easy-to-use platform for tracking data and metrics.

    One of the standout features of this dashboard is its ease of customization. And with simple coding modifications, users can adjust the colors, fonts, and icons in the dashboard to fit their unique brand identity. As a result, it makes it an excellent option for businesses or individuals looking for a dashboard that is both functional and visually appealing.

    In addition to its customization options, the windmill-dashboard project offers a wide range of components that can be easily integrated into any dashboard. Also, its components include everything from dropdown menus and tabs to modals and tables, making it incredibly versatile and adaptable to any dashboard needs.

    • Detailed Accessibility

    Salvia-Kit's : Next JS Admin Dashboard Template

    Salvia-kit's dashboard is built on Next JS, a powerful and efficient framework that ensures lightning-fast performance and smooth navigation.

    The dashboard is both user-friendly and visually appealing. Its intuitive interface makes it easy to find and access the features you need, saving you valuable time and increasing productivity. Furthermore, the NextJS admin dashboard template is highly customizable, allowing you to tailor it to suit your individual needs. You can also choose from a variety of different color schemes and layouts, as well as add or remove widgets.

    Salvia-kit/dashboard-v6

item.title: 使用内置加密模块保护 Node.js 应用程序：使用代码的开发人员指南。 | Securing Node.js Applications with the Built-in Crypto Module: A Guide for Developers with code.
item.description:
阿什菲库扎曼·萨哈尔

发表于 5 月 12 日

在这篇文章中，我们将探讨加密模块的主要特性和一些需要考虑的潜在缺点。

加密模块的主要特性
该模块使用 C++ 实现，可提供快速高效的加密操作。 这使其适用于需要安全通信和数据存储的高性能应用程序。

这确保它与最新的加密标准和最佳实践保持同步。

加密模块的潜在缺点

虽然 crypto 模块提供了一组强大的加密工具，但也有一些潜在的缺点需要考虑：

  1. 复杂性：密码学是一个复杂的领域，使用 crypto 模块需要很好地理解密码学概念和最佳实践。 不熟悉密码学的开发人员可能会发现很难正确使用该模块。
  2. 安全风险：如果使用不当，加密算法和函数很容易受到安全风险的影响。 例如，使用弱加密算法或生成弱加密密钥会危及应用程序的安全性。 开发人员必须意识到这些风险并遵循最佳实践来减轻这些风险。
  3. 兼容性：加密模块可能不兼容所有平台和环境。 例如，某些版本的 Node.js 可能不支持某些加密算法或函数。 开发人员必须确保他们的应用程序与他们的目标平台和环境兼容。

以下是如何加密/解密文本的示例

加密文本“abc”

 var crypto = require('crypto'); var mykey = crypto.createCipher('aes-128-cbc', 'mypassword'); var mystr = mykey.update('abc', 'utf8', 'hex') mystr += mykey.final('hex'); console.log(mystr); //34feb914c099df25794bf9ccb85bea72

解密回'abc'

 var crypto = require('crypto'); var mykey = crypto.createDecipher('aes-128-cbc', 'mypassword'); var mystr = mykey.update('34feb914c099df25794bf9ccb85bea72', 'hex', 'utf8') mystr += mykey.final('utf8'); console.log(mystr); //abc

结论

它的性能、灵活性和受欢迎程度使其成为寻求构建安全应用程序的开发人员的热门选择。 但是，开发人员还必须意识到使用加密模块的潜在缺点，包括其复杂性、安全风险和兼容性问题。 通过遵循最佳实践并与最新的加密标准保持同步，开发人员可以使用加密模块来构建安全可靠的应用程序。

在Node Crypto Official Documentation查看 crypto 的文档

与我联系

如果您想与我联系或关注我以获取更多更新，您可以在以下社交媒体平台上找到我：

欢迎给我留言或关注我，了解更多编程相关内容。 我总是乐于与其他专业人士联系并分享我的知识和经验。

一旦暂停，ashsajal 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，ashsajal 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，ashsajal 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 ashsajal 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 ashsajal 的方法：

降低 ashsajal 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 ashsajal 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Ashfiquzzaman Sajal

Posted on May 12

Node.js is a popular platform for building web applications, server-side scripts, and command-line utilities. One of the core modules that comes with Node.js is the built-in crypto module, which provides a powerful set of cryptographic tools for developers. In this post, we'll explore the key features of the crypto module and some potential drawbacks to consider.

Key Features of the Crypto Module
The crypto module provides developers with a wide range of cryptographic algorithms and functions, including:

  • 1. Hashing algorithms: The module supports popular hashing algorithms such as SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512, which can be used to create message digests for secure storage and verification.
  • 2. Encryption and decryption: The module supports symmetric encryption algorithms such as AES, DES, and Blowfish, as well as asymmetric encryption algorithms such as RSA and ECDSA, which can be used to encrypt and decrypt data securely.
  • 3. Digital signatures: The module supports popular digital signature algorithms such as RSA and DSA, which can be used to sign and verify messages for secure communication.
  • 4. Key generation and management: The module provides functions for generating and managing cryptographic keys, which are essential for secure communication and data storage.
  • 5. One of the key benefits of using the built-in crypto module is its performance. The module is implemented in C++, which provides fast and efficient cryptographic operations. This makes it suitable for use in high-performance applications that require secure communication and data storage.

The crypto module is also widely used in the Node.js community and is actively maintained and updated by the Node.js core team. This ensures that it remains up-to-date with the latest cryptographic standards and best practices.

Potential Drawbacks of the Crypto Module

While the crypto module provides a powerful set of cryptographic tools, there are some potential drawbacks to consider:

  1. Complexity: Cryptography is a complex field, and using the crypto module requires a good understanding of cryptographic concepts and best practices. Developers who are not familiar with cryptography may find it challenging to use the module correctly.
  2. Security risks: Cryptographic algorithms and functions are vulnerable to security risks if they are not used correctly. For example, using weak encryption algorithms or generating weak cryptographic keys can compromise the security of an application. Developers must be aware of these risks and follow best practices to mitigate them.
  3. Compatibility: The crypto module may not be compatible with all platforms and environments. For example, some versions of Node.js may not support certain cryptographic algorithms or functions. Developers must ensure that their applications are compatible with the platforms and environments they are targeting.

Here is the example of how you can encrypt/decrypt a text

Encrypt the text 'abc'

var crypto = require('crypto');

var mykey = crypto.createCipher('aes-128-cbc', 'mypassword');
var mystr = mykey.update('abc', 'utf8', 'hex')
mystr += mykey.final('hex');

console.log(mystr); //34feb914c099df25794bf9ccb85bea72

Decrypt back to 'abc'

var crypto = require('crypto');

var mykey = crypto.createDecipher('aes-128-cbc', 'mypassword');
var mystr = mykey.update('34feb914c099df25794bf9ccb85bea72', 'hex', 'utf8')
mystr += mykey.final('utf8');

console.log(mystr); //abc

Conclusion

The built-in crypto module in Node.js provides developers with a powerful set of cryptographic tools for building secure applications. Its performance, flexibility, and popularity make it a popular choice for developers seeking to build secure applications. However, developers must also be aware of the potential drawbacks of using the crypto module, including its complexity, security risks, and compatibility issues. By following best practices and staying up-to-date with the latest cryptographic standards, developers can use the crypto module to build secure and robust applications.

View the documentation of crypto at Node Crypto Official Documentation

Connect with Me

If you'd like to connect with me or follow me for more updates, you can find me on the following social media platforms:

Feel free to send me a message or follow me for more insights on Programming related contents. I'm always happy to connect with fellow professionals and share my knowledge and experience.

Philip John Basile - Apr 27

Varshith V Hegde - Apr 26

item.title: Medusa (3/4)：商务模块和功能 | Medusa (3/4): Commerce Modules and Features
item.description:
这是四部分系列的第三部分，前几部分介绍了美杜莎的基础知识及其愿景和历史。 这部分将概述一些商务模块及其提供的功能。 最后一部分将详细介绍 Medusa Admin 的工作原理。

模块和功能

有关 Medusa 商务模块和功能如何工作的更多技术细节，您可以访问团队的文档： docs.medusajs.com/

购物车和结帐

带有基本的购物车功能，允许用户轻松添加、更新和删除项目。 开发人员可以选择在结账时通过现有插件或创建自己的插件来集成任何第三方运输和支付选项提供商。

命令

客户下订单购买产品。 管理员可以管理订单，例如捕获付款和履行订单中的项目。 管理员还可以通过强制或客户确认来添加、删除或更新订单来编辑订单。 还可以创建草稿订单以及退货、换货和用新订单替换订单。

多仓库

通过管理页面（见下一篇文章），管理从哪个位置将产品分配到订单或从何处退货也很简单。

顾客

客户可以选择以访客身份购物或创建帐户。 他们可以作为客人进行购买，但也可以作为账户持有人管理订单历史记录和详细信息。 管理员可以将客户分组，从而可以轻松地针对特定群体进行定向营销和折扣。

产品

使用 Medusa 的管理员可以管理无限数量的产品变体。 可以通过价格、库存、产品详细信息等的变化来管理产品，开发人员也可以实现自定义产品信息。 产品也可以被组织成类别，允许客户在浏览时进行导航和过滤。

礼品卡

客户可以在店面购买和使用礼品卡。 开发人员能够实施自定义逻辑以向特定客户发送礼品卡，以及实施专门处理礼品卡履行的运输资料。 也可以使用管理页面创建自定义礼品卡。

价目表

价目表是根据一组条件应用于产品的特殊价格。 价目表可用于添加特殊价格或同时覆盖特定产品的当前价格。 开发人员能够更改默认定价逻辑并实施客户如何以这种方式查看价格的自定义解决方案，与更改单个产品的价格相比，这可以加快管理工作。

地区和货币

使用 Medusa 可以非常灵活地处理区域。 管理员可以指定无限数量的自定义区域。 每个地区都可以有一组自定义设置，例如货币、支付网关、税务提供商等。货币可以与一个或多个地区相关联，开发人员可以完全控制每种货币和每个地区的产品价格。 特定区域内的客户将自动获得针对该区域指定的产品、价格、运输选项、税收等。

税收

税收与​​地区密切相关，因为它们通常在地理上有所不同。 销售渠道

对于每个渠道，可以选择哪些产品属于该渠道，并且可以同时在多个渠道提供产品。 每个订单都与给定的渠道相关联，便于管理和跟进。

美杜莎的机制

在上述每个模块中，美杜莎在其架构中使用了一组抽象。 本节旨在解释 Medusas 商务模块的整体架构。

无头架构

如前所述，Medusa 是一个无头后端，它是在 Express 之上的 Node.js 中构建的。 在 Medusa 核心包中，您可以访问所有商务模块，例如订单、库存、购物车和产品。

实体和服务

后端连接到存储电子商务商店数据的数据库。 数据库中的表由构建在 Typeorm 之上的实体表示。 一个例子是表示数据库中订单表的订单实体。 为了操纵实体*，服务被创建为 TypeScript 或 JavaScript 类，并带有用于检索和其他目的的实用方法。 这些服务可以通过依赖注入在整个 Medusa 后端访问，并且是一种捆绑的辅助方法，代表 Medusa 中的特定功能实体。

端点

每个商务模块都包含一组特定于它提供的功能的端点，并且在 Medusa 后端中可用。

事件

当一个动作发生时，例如下订单，就会触发一个事件。 为了处理事件，Medusa 连接到实现发布/订阅模型的服务。 发布/订阅模型发送的消息由订阅者接收。 订阅者是 TypeScript 或 JavaScript 类，它们将它们的方法添加为特定事件的处理程序。 然后仅在触发事件时执行这些处理程序方法。 使用下订单的示例，特定于订购的服务（发布者）然后向仓库（订阅者）发送消息，以启动发货、更新库存并通知客户。

装载机和插件

加载程序用于加载 Medusa 和自定义资源（例如插件），这些资源可以打包以便在其他 Medusa 后端重用或发布供其他人使用。 现有插件也可以安装到 Medusa 后端。

要了解有关 Medusa Admin 的更多信息，请阅读下一篇文章：



原文:

Medusa offers an impressive amount of e-commerce features all available in the medusa package or separately as independent modules. This is the third part of a four part series where the previous parts covered the basics of Medusa and their vision and history. This part will give a an outline of some of the commerce modules and what features they offer. The final part will go into detail on how the Medusa Admin works.

Modules and Features

For more technical details on how Medusa’s commerce modules and features work, you can visit the team’s Documentation at: docs.medusajs.com/

Cart & Checkout

Comes with basic cart functionality allowing users to add, update and remove items easily. Developers can choose to integrate any third-party provider of shipping and payment options during checkout, either through existing plug-ins or by creating their own.

Orders

Customers place orders to purchase a product. Admins can manage orders, for example capture payment and fulfill items in the order. Admins are also able to edit the order by adding, removing, or updating the order, either by force or by confirmation from the customer. It is also possible to create draft orders as well as returning, swapping and replace orders with new ones.

Multi-Warehouse

Medusa recently updated its Multi-Warehouse module that allows merchants to manage inventory and store products in multiple locations within the same commerce application. Through the admin page (see next article), it is also simple to manage from which location to allocate a product to an order or where to return items.

Customers

Customers can choose to shop as guests or create an account. They are able to make purchases as guests but can also manage order history and details as account holders. Admins can segment customers into groups, allowing for easily directed marketing and discounts for specific groups.

Products

Admins using Medusa can manage an unlimited amount of product variants. Products can be managed through changes in price, inventory, product details etc, and developers are able to implement custom product information as well. Products can also be organized into categories, allowing customers to navigate and filter while browsing.

Gift cards

Medusa handles gift cards in a versatile way. Customers can both purchase and use gift cards on the storefront. Developers are able to implement custom logic to send gift cards to specific customers as well as implement shipping profiles that specifically handle the fulfillment of the card. It is also possible to create custom gift cards using the admin page.

Price lists

Price lists are special prices applied to products based on a set of conditions. Price lists can be used to add special prices or override current prices for specific products simultaneously. Developers are able to change the default pricing logic and implement custom solutions of how customers view prices this way, which can speed up admin work compared to changing prices on individual products.

Regions & Currencies

Regions are handled very flexibly using Medusa. Admins are able to specify an unlimited amount of custom regions. Each region can have a custom set of settings such as currency, payment gateways, tax providers etc. Currencies can be associated with one or many regions, and developers are in full control of the price of a product per currency and per region. A customer within a specific region will automatically get products, prices, shipping options, taxes and more specified for that region.

Taxes

Taxes are closely related to regions since they often differ geographically. Medusa provides default tax provider to calculate rates, but developers are able to integrate custom solutions as well.

Sales channels

Medusa allows for a large amount of different sales channels, such as the web storefront, mobile apps or selling directly through social media platforms. For each channel, it is possible to choose which products belong to the channel, and products can be made available on multiple channels simultaneously. Each order is associated with a given channel, allowing for easy management and follow-up.

The mechanics of Medusa

Within each module described above, Medusa utilizes a set of abstractions in its architecture. This section aims to explain the overall architecture of Medusas commerce modules.

Headless architecture

As mentioned earlier, Medusa is a headless backend and is built in Node.js on top of Express. In the Medusa core package, you get access to all commerce modules such as orders, inventory, cart and products.

Entities and Services

The backend connects to a database that stores the e-commerce store’s data. Tables in the database are represented by entities built on top of Typeorm. An example would be the order-entity which represents the order table in the database. To manipulate e*ntities*, services are created as TypeScript or JavaScript classes with utility methods for retrieval and other purposes. The services can be accessed throughout the Medusa backend through dependency injection and are a sort of a bundled helper methods that represent a certain entity of functionality in Medusa.

Endpoints

Rather than having a tightly-coupled frontend which is the case for traditional e-commerce platforms, the Medusa backend provides endpoints, which are REST APIs used by frontends like storefront or admin interfaces. Each commerce module contains a set of endpoints specific to the functionalities that it provides and are available within the Medusa backend.

Events

Medusa also uses an event-driven architecture to manage events. When an action occur, such as an order being placed, an event is triggered. To handle an event, Medusa connects to a service that implements a pub/sub model. Messages sent by the pub/sub model are received by subscribers. Subscribers are TypeScript or JavaScript classes that add their methods as handlers for specific events. These handler methods are then executed only when an event is triggered. Using the example of an order being placed, a service specific to ordering (the publisher) then sends a message to the warehouse (the subscriber) that initiate shipping, update the inventory and notify customers.

Loaders and plugins

The Medusa backend architecture can be tailored to suit individual requirements, with resources like entities, services and endpoints created without modifying the backend. Loaders are used to load both Medusa and custom resources such as plugins, which can be packaged for reuse in other Medusa backends or published for others to use. Existing plugins can also be installed into a Medusa backend.

To learn more about the Medusa Admin, read the next article:
item.author: ntyrberg

item.description:
一旦暂停，coderethanliu 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，coderethanliu 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，coderethanliu 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 coderethanliu 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 coderethanliu：

降低 coderethanliu 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 coderethanliu 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Once suspended, coderethanliu will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, coderethanliu will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by coderethanliu will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If coderethanliu is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag coderethanliu:

Make all posts by coderethanliu less visible

coderethanliu consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging coderethanliu will restore default visibility to their posts.
